title: Magic numbers should be avoided
description: Magic numbers are hard-coded numerical values that lack context and make code less readable and maintainable. Instead of using raw numbers directly in code, they should be replaced with named constants that clearly express their purpose and meaning. This improves code clarity and makes future maintenance easier.
recommendation: Replace magic numbers with named constants that clearly express their purpose.

compliant: const MAX_ITEMS = 100; for (let i = 0; i < MAX_ITEMS; i++) { process(i); }

checks.message: Replace magic number with a named constant for better code readability
